_comment: Canonical v66 multitable engine-restart-benchmark recipe. Run via scripts/run_v66_engine_restart_benchmark.py (do not hand-assemble CLI flags). Use a single outdir per iteration such as outputs/diagnostics/engine_restart_benchmark_live_parallel_vNNx_chem323_<purpose>/ (replace v66_recipe_placeholder or pass --outdir). Multitable refresh order: data/simulation_validation/v66_multitable_refresh_order.md. After editing openfoam_custom_solvers/larrakEngineFoam/, set refresh_custom_solver true once to force Docker wmake; otherwise source_hash cache invalidates on change.
